title: Omniterra Calendar
description: The Omniterra Calendar mod is extremely basic and provides a daily message in the chat to tell you what day of the week, day, month, and year it is. This mod uses a custom made date system to fit the theme and potential lore of Minecraft.
body:
I searched for a date tracking/calendar mod and could not find one to build lore in my world. So with the work of many hours of YT videos and chatGPT I have created this VERY basic mod. All it does is sent a chat at the beginning of everyday letting you know what day it is off a calendar system I created.

I made a calendar graphic that is available in the gallery. If you would like to download the full size here a link to it from Google Drive:
[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OTmODouM_elUNONHWY10Zrl0hB5on-XW/view?usp=drive_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OTmODouM_elUNONHWY10Zrl0hB5on-XW/view?usp=drive_link)

(Please note that calendar graphic was made entirely by me apart from the pixel art images which are generated using chatGPT. I support human artists but this is a simple side project with no intention to making money so I just whipped up something quick.)

Please feel free to use however you would like to use this. There is no need for you to ask to use in modpacks if you wish, but I would love to see your pack if you do use it :). Lastly, it is very unlikely I will update this unless there is a demand for it. 

Have fun!
